Jump into what's live, right now.

Pickup basketball at 8. A study room that just opened up. Spaces are happening on campus in real time — Riply just shows you where, then lets you talk about it.

Built for campus, not for scale.

Right now, campus life is scattered across group chats, printed flyers, and apps that were never built for students. Riply puts your groups, your events, and what's happening on campus right now in one place — so finding your people doesn't take five apps.

Be first on campus.
